title: God Save The Queen
description: Step into the royal inner circle with Queen Elizabeth II in God save the Queen! — the riotous one-woman comedy show where Queen Liz 2 finally tells her side of the story. From awkward palace dinners to scandalous secrets and royal rivalries, nothing is off-limits as Lizzy spills the tea with wit, charm, and a gin in hand. Whether you’re a die-hard royal watcher or just here for the gossip, this hilarious and cheeky take on life behind the palace walls is a must-see. One crown, one woman, zero filters. Long live the Queen... of comedy!
